query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "many-shot cot-icl: making in-context learning truly learn" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (a) by investigating the same core mechanism (Chain-of-Thought reasoning) and providing a theoretical framework for how LLMs "learn" or process information during inference, which is directly relevant to the user's goal of extending the "Many-Shot CoT-ICL" work linguistically.
